title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 161.502 - Definitions
text:
161.502.  Definitions. — As used in sections 161.500 to 161.508, the following terms mean:
  (1)  "Department", the department of elementary and secondary education;
  (2)  "Drugs" includes, but is not limited to:
  (a)  All controlled substances defined in chapter 195; and
  (b)  Alcoholic beverages.
(L. 1990 S.B. 740 § 32)
